extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters involving the Company, Promoters, Directors and Goa Facility, with criminal, statutory/regulatory and tax rows distinct from one another. For criminal proceedings against, I counted 10 Company matters after excluding 61 Company-filed complaints, 128 Promoter matters after excluding 71 ZACL-filed complaints, and 3 Director matters; regulatory counts are the 5 Company, 1 Promoter and 1 Director matters, while tax counts are 44 Company and 9 Goa Facility matters, excluding promoter tax matters. The quantified aggregate against the Company/group is based on the Company direct-tax amount of ₹3,263.05 million plus Goa Facility tax proceedings of ₹897.80 million, totaling ₹4,160.85 million; other criminal and civil amounts were not isolated from matters filed by the Company or otherwise mixed. Contingent liabilities are disclosed as line items as of December 31, 2021; their summed amount is ₹2,704.16 million, or ₹270.416 crore, because no stated total row is provided. The concentration figures disclosed are state-level revenue-from-operations percentages, not company-wide top-five or top-ten customer concentration, so those fields are null. The source tables use ₹ million; amounts are converted to crore by dividing by 10 (₹10 million = ₹1 crore).
